scripts.deploy:static: npm run build && npx --yes -p @cloudbase/cli tcb hosting deploy ./dist / -e price-comparing-demo-d2adc62c70c
scripts.deploy:fn: npx --yes -p @cloudbase/cli tcb fn code update analyzeQuotes -e price-comparing-demo-d2adc62c70c --deployMode cos --dir ./cloudfunctions/analyzeQuotes && npx --yes -p @cloudbase/cli tcb fn code update generateReport -e price-comparing-demo-d2adc62c70c --deployMode cos --dir ./cloudfunctions/generateReport
